reasoning: The FRED data shows initial claims 4-week MA has seen a steady downward trend since its peak in September (dropping from 239k to 226.7k). Historically (based on the previous year's data provided by the FRED tool), claims dropped significantly from late October into November and January (236k in Oct to 218k by mid-Nov). This seasonal decline combined with the recent downward momentum over the past month suggests it is more likely than not that the 4-week MA will be lower than the 226,750 baseline at the resolution dates. Due to the requirement that uncertainty increases with the forecast horizon, I gradually approach 0.5 for the later dates.
